{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Kareia
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Kareia]] is the most abundant of the [[United Worlds]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Kareia]] is a location with clouds.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Nations and empires]]
